topics: peace and purity of the church
synopsis: Complaint of Devin and Tracey Ehrlich against North Georgia Presbytery regarding the Presbytery's denial of the Ehrlichs' complaint about the Intown Community Church Session's instruction prohibiting distribution of an open letter criticizing a pastor under investigation. The SJC held that the Session acted within its authority in preventing distribution of the letter, as it would disturb the peace of the church after the Presbytery had investigated and dismissed the underlying allegations against the pastor.
